tasks.label: Verify Task
tasks.command: STATE_FILE="${STATE_FILE:-ai/state.json}"; ORCHESTRATOR_MODEL="${ORCHESTRATOR_MODEL:-gpt-5.5}"; echo "=== verify-orchestrator ===" && hermes chat --yolo --model poolside/laguna-m.1:free --provider openrouter -q "Act as agents/orchestrator.md" && sleep 30 && TASK_PROMPT="$(jq -r '.task_agent // empty' "$STATE_FILE")" && test -n "$TASK_PROMPT" || { echo "No task_agent found in $STATE_FILE"; exit 1; }; echo "=== verify-tasker ===" && hermes chat --yolo --model deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash:free --provider nous -q "$TASK_PROMPT" && sleep 30 && OPEN_PR_COUNT="$(gh pr list --state open --limit 100 --json number --jq 'length')" && if [ "$OPEN_PR_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "Skipping new-task-orchestrator because $OPEN_PR_COUNT open PR(s) exist."; gh pr list --state open; else echo "=== new-task-orchestrator ==="; codex exec --skip-git-repo-check --model "$ORCHESTRATOR_MODEL" --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox "Act as agents/orchestrator.md"; fi
